issues.title: @membership_required + _get_org() + service signatures
issues.attack: All views use @login_required only, missing @membership_required. request.user.organization doesn't exist. Dashboard services require (user, org).
issues.response: Fully accepted. All views must use @membership_required + _get_org(request). Service calls need org parameter.

issues.title: Dashboard URL routing
issues.attack: Dashboard routes in projects/urls.py create /projects/dashboard/ instead of /dashboard/. main/urls.py already routes /dashboard/.
issues.response: Accepted. Dashboard views managed in main/urls.py, not projects/urls.py.

issues.title: project_close DB CHECK constraint
issues.attack: Saving closed_at without updating status violates project_open_implies_no_closed_at constraint.
issues.response: Accepted. Must set status=CLOSED explicitly before save.

issues.title: forms.py destruction + IDOR
issues.attack: Full rewrite deletes forms used by existing views. Missing org-scoped querysets enable IDOR.
issues.response: Accepted. Preserve existing forms, add org-scoped querysets to new forms.

issues.title: project_create drops collision/approval
issues.attack: Simplified create drops collision detection and approval workflow. FINAL-SPEC preserves ProjectApproval.
issues.response: Accepted. Preserve existing collision + approval workflow.

issues.title: Kanban role-based scoping
issues.attack: get_project_kanban_cards(org) returns all org projects. Consultants should see assigned only.
issues.response: Accepted. Apply owner/consultant filtering in view.

issues.title: URL name compatibility
issues.attack: Renaming project_update to project_edit breaks existing templates and tests.
issues.response: Accepted. Keep existing URL names. Add new URLs only.

issues.title: project_reopen phase recalculation
issues.attack: Phase signal only fires on ActionItem/Application changes, not Project save.
issues.response: Accepted. Call compute_project_phase() explicitly on reopen.

issues.title: project_close pending ActionItem cleanup
issues.attack: Manual close leaves pending ActionItems in dashboard.
issues.response: Accepted. Add closed_at filter to dashboard queries.

issues.title: close/reopen/edit permission model
issues.attack: No permission rules defined for sensitive state changes.
issues.response: Accepted. Define: create/edit/close/reopen = owner + assigned consultant. delete = owner only.
